productDisplayName: Nike Men Transform III Black Sports Shoes
description: The nike Transform III shoe offers outstanding comfort and support for the demanding athlete. This lightweight shoe is for the runner who wants to make a statement without sacrificing comfort and performance.UpperCanvas upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced durabilityPerforations on the forefoot for breathabilityLace up system for a snug,  customised FitPadded tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movementWaffle-pattern lugs for grip and tractionScooped heel for extra cushioning to the backfootShoe careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with a dry clean cloth
